allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add ML training system, edge calculator, and parlay builder

Major features:
- ML training pipeline with model registry and versioning
- Production predictor with ML+Statistical ensemble \(60/40 split\)
- Edge calculator comparing predictions to PrizePicks lines
- Parlay builder with --overs-only flag for optimal play selection
- PrizePicks API client with correct league IDs

Critical bug fix:
- Fixed ML training target from HIT/MISS to actual OVER/UNDER outcomes
- This was causing inverted predictions \(predicting OVER when should be UNDER\)

Documentation:
- docs/ML_TRAINING.md - ML system documentation
- docs/EDGE_CALCULATOR.md - Edge calculator and parlay builder guide
- docs/QUICKSTART.md - Daily workflow quick reference
- Updated README.md with new features and usage

Files added:
- ml_training/model_manager.py
- ml_training/production_predictor.py
- shared/edge_calculator.py
- shared/prizepicks_client.py

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix NBA prop-specific stats and add PrizePicks leg values

NBA Feature Extractors:
- Fixed _get_stat_column\(\) to include all prop types \(steals, blocks,
  turnovers, pts_rebs, pts_asts, rebs_asts, fantasy, etc.\)
- Previously defaulted to ''points'' for unknown props, causing wrong
  averages \(e.g., steals showing 28.8 instead of 0.5\)

NBA V6 Script:
- Fixed SUPPORTED_PROPS to use ''stocks'' instead of ''blks_stls''
- Added filter to skip unsupported props like ''dunks''

NHL V6 Script:
- Fixed import paths for features module
- Fixed schedule fetcher path to use absolute path
- Fixed StatisticalPredictionEngine to receive DB_PATH

SmartPickSelector:
- Added leg values: Goblin=0.5x, Standard=1.0x, Demon=1.5x
- Updated break-even rates based on parlay payouts:
  - Goblin: 76% \(easier line, less payout\)
  - Standard: 56% \(normal\)
  - Demon: 45% \(harder line, more payout\)
- Updated output to show leg value per pick
- Updated payout guide with correct examples

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
